mainDegree: Engineer (E) in Computer Science and Informatics | Full Stack Developer

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Software Engineer with experience in software development, REST API integration, cloud infrastructure, and DevOps practices. Proficient in AWS, GCP, Terraform, Jenkins, Docker, and Linux. Knowledgeable in the use of LLM models and the application of generative AI for NLP tasks. Experienced in agile methodologies and collaborative development. Currently pursuing a Diploma in Cybersecurity at Universidad Autónoma de Chile, and looking for jobs as a Software Engineer, Backend Developer, Frontend Developer, Full Stack Developer, DevOps Trainee.
